name: uelfy-clinical
description: Uelfy — B2B cardio-nephro-metabolic clinical risk assessment and longitudinal patient monitoring platform.

scripts.build: node scripts/fetch-noto-fonts.mjs && node scripts/fetch-supabase-sdk.mjs && node scripts/inject-public-config.mjs && node scripts/check-engine-determinism.mjs && node scripts/verify-build.mjs
scripts.build:check: node scripts/fetch-noto-fonts.mjs && node scripts/fetch-supabase-sdk.mjs && node scripts/inject-public-config.mjs && node scripts/verify-build.mjs && node scripts/check-engine-determinism.mjs && node scripts/check-rate-limit-async.mjs && node scripts/check-sbom.mjs && node scripts/check-sbom-cves.mjs && tsc --noEmit --project tsconfig.json
